title: Companion — The Nobori Field
medium: generative canvas — a rural street at dusk populated with vertical cloth banners on bamboo poles at three receding depths. wind and alive-fraction are sliders. alive banners flutter, still banners hang limp. watch the field's 'is anyone here?' answer change.
caption: Twitching is the cheapest possible answer to the only question a rural strip is ever asked. Drop the wind or the alive-fraction and the street goes quiet even when the physical objects are unchanged.
